title: Part 5 – Phrases à compléter : divertissement
instructions: Choisissez le mot ou le groupe de mots qui complète correctement chaque phrase.

questions.sentence: The restaurant is fully booked ____ Saturday evening.
questions.explanation: Préposition utilisée avec un jour de la semaine : "on Saturday".

questions.sentence: We ____ to the new Italian restaurant downtown last weekend.
questions.explanation: "last weekend" est un indicateur de prétérit : "went".

questions.sentence: The concert tickets sold out ____ a few hours.
questions.explanation: "in + durée" indique le temps nécessaire pour qu'une action se produise : "sold out in a few hours".

questions.sentence: Guests are kindly asked ____ their phones during the performance.
The hotel offers a discount ____ guests who book directly through their website.
